title: maesa cavinervis
intro: Maesa cavinervis, also known as the Borneo boxwood, is a species of plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Maesa cavinervis include its ability to treat malaria and other febrile conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Maesa cavinervis include extracts and infusions, which can be used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
